title: Spicy Ramen Noodle Soup
description: A spicy and savory Japanese-inspired noodle soup recipe. Perfect for a quick lunch or dinner.
instructions: 1. Cook ramen noodles according to package instructions.
2. In a large pot, heat the savory broth over medium heat.
3. Add the spicy miso paste and stir until dissolved.
4. Add the sliced green onions, bean sprouts, and mushrooms (if using) to the pot.
5. Cook for 3-4 minutes or until the vegetables are tender.
6. Add the cooked ramen noodles to the pot and toss to combine.
7. If using, add the sliced pork or tofu to the pot and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes.
8. Season with soy sauce and sesame oil to taste.
9. Serve hot and garnish with additional green onions if desired.
